headline: Synchrony Expands Partnership with Lowe's as New Issuer of Co-Brand Credit Card for Home Improvement Professionals
summary: Synchrony (NYSE: SYF), a leading consumer financing company, today announced an expanded co-brand partnership with Lowe's (NYSE: LOW), with Synchrony now issuing the MyLowe's Pro Rewards American Express® Card. The new card complements the existing MyLowe's Pro Rewards Credit Card, which can be used only in Lowe's stores. The new card can be used anywhere American Express (NYSE: AXP) is accepted, helping extend Pro purchasing power and rewards earning potential beyond Lowe's.
